line_items.description: Smartphones, model MTG-P30 Pro, 5G capable, 6.7-inch OLED display, 256GB storage, 12GB RAM, triple rear camera system, Android OS, with USB-C charging cable and protective case. FCC ID pending.
Cold-rolled steel flat products in coils, full hard, thickness 0.7mm, width 1000mm, uncoated, ASTM A1008 specification, suitable for automotive stamping applications.

Network surveillance cameras, IP-based, 4K resolution, 8MP sensor, H.265+ compression, IR night vision 50m range, outdoor weatherproof IP67, PoE powered, with analytics software license. Model MTG-CAM-4K-8MP.

additional_context: Complex mixed shipment. Note: consignee information is missing from the bill of lading — ISF may be incomplete. Surveillance cameras from Chinese manufacturer may be subject to NDAA Section 889 restrictions for US government use. Smartphones are subject to Section 301 List 4A (7.5%). Steel is subject to Section 301 List 3 (25%) plus active AD/CVD orders. Total declared value: $253,000 USD.
